title: phanera integrifolia subsp. nymphaeifolia
intro: Phanera integrifolia subsp. nymphaeifolia, also known as the Nymphaea-leaf Phanera, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apocynaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving headaches and body aches, and supporting the immune system. Phanera integrifolia subsp. nymphaeifolia can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional folk medicine in various parts of the world.
